122.reason: [Attempting to free memory using q->last after q has been updated to q->next leads to undefined behavior. Also, the node pointed by q itself is never freed, causing memory leaks. Moreover, when q becomes NULL, q->last is invalid.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-single: 1.0 , reason:  [Attempting to free memory using q->last after q has been updated to q->next leads to undefined behavior. Also, the node pointed by q itself is never freed, causing memory leaks. Moreover, when q becomes NULL, q->last is invalid.]
